'''gangazha''' is an [[Aelaki]] [[Nouns|noun]] meaning "[[Wikt:crabbedness|crabbedness]] (auto-generated)". It has inherent '''male''' gender.

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| g-ng-zh
|-
! Word class
| [[Noun]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:crabbedness|crabbedness]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Inherent gender
| male
|-
! Citation form
| gangazha
|}

== Inflected forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[male]].[[collective]] || [[word:gængæzhæth|gængæzhæth]] || [[word:gængæzhæj|gængæzhæj]] || [[word:gængæzhæsh|gængæzhæsh]] || [[word:gængæzhæ|gængæzhæ]]
|-
| [[male]].[[plural]] || [[word:gangangazhath|gangangazhath]] || [[word:gangangazhaj|gangangazhaj]] || [[word:gangangazhash|gangangazhash]] || [[word:gangangazha|gangangazha]]
|-
| [[male]].[[singular]] || [[word:gangazhath|gangazhath]] || [[word:gangazhaj|gangazhaj]] || [[word:gangazhash|gangazhash]] || [[word:gangazha|gangazha]]
|-
| [[male]].[[zero]] || [[word:gangafzhafth|gangafzhafth]] || [[word:gangafzhafj|gangafzhafj]] || [[word:gangafzhafsh|gangafzhafsh]] || [[word:gangafzhaf|gangafzhaf]]
|}

''16 forms generated.''

== Case paradigm ==
''Shown for male singular.''
{| class="wikitable"
! Case !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[Agent]] || [[word:gangazhatha|gangazhatha]] || [[word:gangazhaja|gangazhaja]] || [[word:gangazhasha|gangazhasha]] || [[word:gangazhaka|gangazhaka]]
|-
| [[Patient]] || [[word:gangazhath|gangazhath]] || [[word:gangazhaj|gangazhaj]] || [[word:gangazhash|gangazhash]] || [[word:gangazha|gangazha]]
|-
| [[Possessive]] || [[word:gangazhathal|gangazhathal]] || [[word:gangazhajal|gangazhajal]] || [[word:gangazhashal|gangazhashal]] || [[word:gangazhakal|gangazhakal]]
|-
| [[Instrumental]] || [[word:gangazhaathatha|gangazhaathatha]] || [[word:gangazhaajaja|gangazhaajaja]] || [[word:gangazhaashasha|gangazhaashasha]] || [[word:gangazhaaka|gangazhaaka]]
|-
| [[Dative]] || [[word:gangazhathan|gangazhathan]] || [[word:gangazhajan|gangazhajan]] || [[word:gangazhashan|gangazhashan]] || [[word:gangazhakan|gangazhakan]]
|-
| [[Speaker]] || [[word:gangazhathaoro|gangazhathaoro]] || [[word:gangazhajaoro|gangazhajaoro]] || [[word:gangazhashaoro|gangazhashaoro]] || [[word:gangazhakaoro|gangazhakaoro]]
|}

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]

[[Category:Aelaki male nouns]]
[[Category:Aelaki vocabulary]]
[[Category:Aelaki lemmas]]
[[Category:Word pages]]
{{wordpage|1a7b009}}
